content.en:
Ye Tian spent some Ga Lan Bao Coin and successfully purchased these data information, which was much more comprehensive than the information purchased before.

After all, there is no restriction on this kind of knowledge here, and it is naturally allowed to be sold.

After purchasing these materials, Ye Tian browsed through them and quickly learned the true mysteries about the peak realm god and the half-step transcendent realm.

According to these materials, if the peak realm gods comprehend the true superdimensional power, most of them will condense the thirteenth eternal realm spirit after condensing the thirteenth eternal realm spirit, and then they will condense the superdimensional dao species and achieve a half-step superdimensional realm.

However, a very small number of Peak Realm Gods would condense the fourteenth Eternal Realm Spirit, or even the fifteenth Eternal Realm Spirit.

However, it was too difficult to condense the fourteenth Eternal Realm Spirit, and it was unimaginably large.

Ye Tian is still refining the Eternal Dao Seed now, but even if he tempers the Eternal Dao Seed to the extreme, he can't even think of condensing the fourteenth Eternal Realm Spirit unless he can comprehend the power of the Transcendent Dimension to the Xiaocheng realm.

"The power of the extradimensional is small!"

Ye Tian muttered to himself.

After he comprehended the power of the superdimension, he completely took charge of the power of the superdimension, but he didn't know how to cultivate in the future.

But now I know that the power of the super dimension can be improved, but not the amount of improvement, after all, the power of the super dimension under his control is endless, and there is no concept of quantity, if you want to continue to improve, you can only improve the quality.

But it is too difficult to improve the power of the super dimension, and many half-step super dimensional realms that comprehend the power of the super dimension are all black-eyed and don't understand anything.

According to the information, there is only one way to improve the power of the extra-dimensional, and that is to open up the extra-dimensional heart domain.

However, if the peak realm god wants to open up the super-dimensional heart domain, it is almost a life of nine deaths, and if he opens up the super-dimensional heart domain in the half-step super-dimensional realm, even if he fails, he will only be seriously injured.

Therefore, it is impossible for those peak realm gods who have comprehended the power of the transcendent dimension to take the risk of opening up the transcendent heart domain, and they will definitely impact the half-step transcendent realm, as long as they do not fall in the future, the foundation is fine, and they will become the transcendent realm!

The extradimensional realm is so terrifying, who would risk their lives in order to condense one more eternal realm spirit!

"After opening up the super-dimensional heart domain, you can conceive the super-dimensional power, and then refine and improve the super-dimensional power itself, until the super-dimensional power transforms and reaches the realm of Xiaocheng. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Other peak realm gods who comprehended the power of the transcendent dimension did not dare to open up the transcendent heart domain, but he dared!

But there must also be a way to open up the extra-dimensional heart domain, and if it is opened up indiscriminately, it will definitely die.

The Garan Chamber of Commerce has a way to open up the extradimensional heart domain, but it is very expensive.

"10,000,000 Galanbao Coins!"

Ye Tian frowned.

This is much more expensive than the price of the extradimensional Dao species!

However, if you think about it carefully, the super-dimensional Dao species are prepared for the pinnacle realm gods, but the method of opening up the super-dimensional heart domain is prepared for the half-step super-dimensional realm, and the half-step super-dimensional realm is very rich, so it will naturally be sold expensively.

"It's only 10 million Galanbol coins, I can afford it!"

Ye Tian purchased a copy of the opening method of the Extradimensional Heart Domain, and immediately left the branch of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce.

......

The Extreme Yang Realm, the Broken Void City.

It's not very powerful in the Extreme Yang Realm, but it's also relatively safe, and many Peak Realm gods rent mansions here, allowing outsiders to stay here for a long time.

Therefore, he was going to rent a mansion here to practice, so that he would not be disturbed.

In addition, there are many flights to other extradimensional realms in Broken Void City, so it is convenient for him to leave if he wants to.

Soon, Ye Tian rented a mansion, the interior of this mansion was very large, and a superdimensional array was arranged, the grade of this superdimensional array was even more powerful than the Star Dimensional Void Heaven Array, enough to withstand the attack of the half-step superdimensional realm.

Of course, the cost of renting such a mansion is naturally high.

If calculated in terms of Galanbol Coins, an extradimensional epoch would need to pay 1,000,000 Galanbol Coins.

However, there were too many cultivators in the Six Thousand Realm, and there were countless gods in the peak realm, and they were also extremely chaotic.

If you don't want to spend this money, you can find a place to open up a void cultivation by yourself, but it is very dangerous, maybe you will be targeted by a half-step extradimensional realm and killed directly.

Other than that.

Many forces in the Extreme Yang Realm do not allow other peak realm gods to open up dojos such as Void and Cave Heaven in their own territory, and once they are discovered, they will directly destroy them.

This forced those peak realm gods to buy mansions or rent mansions on formal occasions. []

Ye Tian is very rich, but he doesn't care about these expenses.....

For him, settle down in the Six Thousand Territory first.

He is still too weak now, and he has no background, any half-step extradimensional realm can kill him, so naturally he can't break in.

Now cultivating in this safe place, if he cultivates to the Extra-Dimensional Heart Domain, his strength will inevitably skyrocket.

So, for now, let's keep a low profile and practice silently here.

Of course, he would occasionally go to understand the territory of No. 6,000, after all, he had other copy bodies, and he practiced in the territory of number seven thousand three hundred and sixty-two, and this copy body did not practice and did not affect the progress of cultivation.

......

"Extra-dimensional heart domain, let's start cultivating!"

After Ye Tian understood the method of opening up the super-dimensional heart domain, he began to open up the super-dimensional heart domain.

The reason why the Transcendental Mind Domain is opened up within the Eternal Dao Species, and the reason why it is extremely dangerous is that the Eternal Dao Species is too weak to carry the power of the Transcendental Mental Domain, while the Extradimensional Dao Species is much better.

Once the opening fails, the Eternal Dao Seed will be directly shattered.

"Open up!"

Rumble!!!!

Countless extradimensional powers poured into the Eternal Dao Species, opening up in the same way as opening up the extradimensional heart domain.

However, he failed to open up after a while, and the terrifying extradimensional power became extremely chaotic, directly shattering his eternal Dao seed and physical body.

In an instant, he fell.

"Opening up the extra-dimensional heart domain is really dangerous!"

Ye Tian 3.3 used the second replica body to continue to open up the extra-dimensional heart domain, but the second time also failed.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian condensed one copy body after another, trying to open up the extra-dimensional heart domain again and again.

But it was too difficult for the peak realm god to open up the extra-dimensional heart domain, and there was no strong person to guide him and assist him, so everything could only rely on himself.

As he opened up the extra-dimensional heart domain more times, he gradually gained a lot of insights, and he also knew that if he wanted to open up the super dimensional heart domain, he must grasp the appropriate opportunity to disperse the power of the super dimensional heart domain, so as not to burst the entire eternal dao species.

And the method of opening up sold by the Garan Chamber of Commerce is actually not suitable for him, that is, the fit is not enough, so he has opened up so many times and still failed.

Therefore, he needs to improve a little, otherwise he will still fail after opening up countless times.
